hero.description: Fund regenerative projects directly. Every Bumicert is a verified record of real environmental work — backed by photos, locations, and community stewards.

verified.title: Verified environmental impact
verified.description: Every certificate is backed by photos, geolocation data, and community verification.

direct.title: Direct community funding
direct.description: Your support goes straight to the stewards doing on-ground restoration work.

transparent.title: Decentralized & transparent
transparent.description: Your work, verified. Unchangeable proof of restoration that builds your reputation with donors and communities.

paths.title: Choose Your Path
paths.description: Whether you're here to fund impact or showcase your work, there's a place for you.

funders.label: For Funders
funders.title: I want to support
funders.description: Browse verified certificates and fund the exact moment of restoration.

organizations.label: For Organizations
organizations.title: I am a nature
organizations.description: Showcase your regenerative work and connect with funders who care.

digitalCertificate.question: A digital certificate of impact
digitalCertificate.answer: A Bumicert records a specific environmental action — giving it a permanent, verifiable identity on an open, decentralized network (the same technology that powers Bluesky).

evidence.question: Backed by real evidence
evidence.answer: Photos, geolocation, timestamps, monitoring data. Every claim is verifiable. This isn't a promise of future impact — it's proof of work already done.

communities.question: A direct line to communities
communities.answer: When you fund a Bumicert, your money reaches the exact people doing the restoration. No intermediaries skimming fees. No vague overhead.

story.question: Your claim to the story
story.answer: Owning a Bumicert means you're part of that moment. A tree planted. A reef restored. An ecosystem revived. It's yours to share, hold, or gift.

certificate.previewDescription: Community-led restoration of native forest in West Java, Indonesia. 5,000 trees planted across 12 hectares.

maEarthBanner.label: Ma Earth Funding Round 3
maEarthBanner.title: Apply for the Ma Earth Funding Round 3
maEarthBanner.description: GainForest communities can use verified project stories, evidence, and impact records from Bumicerts while applying on Ma Earth’s community-backed funding round.
